response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong technical background in AI-related initiatives (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators) and cloud-native development. While his academic focus is not explicitly AI/ML, his entrepreneurial projects (GISCollective) and leadership in open-source tools demonstrate innovative thinking. His lack of a Master's/PhD in AI is a minor gap, but his hands-on AI work and strategic contributions (e.g., optimizing pricing strategies, low-latency microservices) align well with the role’s requirements.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and AI-infrastructure domains
Proven track record in building scalable platforms (GISCollective) and contributing to AI-agent tooling (MCP, developer frameworks)
Strong leadership in open-source projects and entrepreneurial ventures, showcasing innovation and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: Lacks a Master's/PhD in an AI-related field, which is preferred for this role
Limited direct experience in cloud platform strategy or advising strategic customers on AI technologies
Most recent AI work (AI-agent infrastructure) is at re:cinq (April 2025–Present), which may not demonstrate long-term depth in AI strategy
